## Athlete Info

- **Name / alias:**
- **Training modality:** <!-- bodyweight / gym / mixed / running -->
- **Experience level:** <!-- beginner / intermediate / advanced -->
- **Primary goal:** <!-- hypertrophy / strength / fat loss / skill / recomp / endurance -->

## Local Profile Memory

- [ ] `profile/<profile_id>/core.json`
- [ ] `profile/<profile_id>/plan.json`
- [ ] `profile/<profile_id>/progress.jsonl`

`profile/` is local-only and ignored by Git. Do not attach private profile data
to issues.

## Notes

<!-- Known injuries, equipment constraints, schedule, anything relevant to profiling phase -->
